changes.value:
## What
Delete the entire `vendor/sem/` directory and remove all references from the workspace.

Cleanup:
- `rm -rf vendor/sem/`
- Remove `vendor/sem/crates/sem-core` from workspace `members` in root `Cargo.toml`
- Remove `sem-core = { path = ... }` from workspace `[dependencies]`
- Remove any `.gitmodules` or git submodule references if applicable
- Check no other crates depend on `sem-core`

Files:
- `vendor/sem/` (delete entire directory)
- `Cargo.toml` (remove workspace member + dependency)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `vendor/sem/` directory does not exist
- [ ] `cargo check` succeeds for entire workspace
- [ ] `cargo tree | grep git2` returns nothing (git2 fully eliminated)
- [ ] `cargo release minor --dry-run` no longer hits libgit2-sys conflict

## Tests
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] `cargo tree | grep libgit2` returns nothing
- [ ] `cargo release minor --dry-run` succeeds (or at least gets past the packaging step)
SEM-6: Remove vendor/sem and clean up workspace
